name: Logz.io
description: Monitor Logz.io for user access management, account health, and log monitoring configuration

config.setupInstructions: Log into Logz.io, go to Settings (gear icon) > Tools > Manage tokens > API tokens. Generate a new token. Your region is the two-letter code in your login URL (e.g. app.logz.io = US, app-eu.logz.io = EU).

credentialFields.label: Account Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Logz.io account region (check your login URL)

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate at Settings > Tools > Manage tokens > API tokens

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to Logz.io API by retrieving the account's user list

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users across the Logz.io account and sub-accounts to verify access is appropriate

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Reviews configured alerts in Logz.io to verify monitoring is active
